name: Barbara Bauer Briggs Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Barbara Bauer Briggs Family YMCA in Victoria, TX! There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play. The court can be reserved.
fees: Members only — Daily guest pass available

name: Victoria College Sports Center
description: Victoria College Sports Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Victoria, TX. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Victoria Youth Sports Complex
description: Victoria Youth Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Victoria, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: There’s a group that plays at 5:30am, a group at 7am, and an evening group
